subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath been named Báqir - upon him rest My glory - for verily he turned unto the Countenance whilst the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی الاعلی اذکر من سمی بباقر علیه بهائی انه اقبل الی الوجه اذ کان الناس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
